chunks.text: 1 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. S – 314 of 2022 _____________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge Hearing/Priority 1.For hearing of CMA No.2154/22 2.For hearing of main case 20.11.2025 Mr. Naveed Ali, advocate for petitioner......... This petition is directed against the concurrent findings of the Courts below whereby an application filed by the petitioner seeking payment of decreetal amount in installments was partly allowed. For the sake of convenience, operative part of the order dated 09.11.2020, is reproduced hereunder:- “The defendant/JD failed to comply with the directions of this Court and filed instant application. After hearing of both the parties, in view of above facts and circumstances, application for installments of decreetal amount is hereby disposed of with direction to the defendant/JD to deposit current decreetal amount plus Rs.15,000/- remaining amount without fail. The application is disposed of accordingly, with no order as to costs”. Counsel contends that the petitioner is ready and willing to comply with the aforesaid order passed by the Executing Court. Since the petitioner has demonstrated his readiness to deposit the decreetal amount in terms of the above said order passed by the Executing Court, he may do so. In view of the statement given by counsel for the petitioner, the purpose of this petition has been served and the same is hereby disposed of with no order as to cost. Office to send a copy of this order to the Executing Court for information. J U D G E Ashraf
